extensionDescription.message: Add custom tabs to the Salesforce setup menu.

openFullSettingsButton.description: Button to open standalone settings page

openFullSettingsHelp.message: Try the new standalone settings page with a better layout and all configuration options in one place
openFullSettingsHelp.description: Help text for full settings button

compactModeDescription.message: Display tabs in a more condensed layout

skipDeleteConfirmationDescription.message: Don't ask for confirmation when deleting tabs

appearanceDescription.message: Customize the look and feel of your extension

syncStorageDescription.message: Manage how your tabs are stored and synced

useSyncStorageDescription.message: Sync your tabs across all devices using browser sync

profilesDescription.message: Organize tabs into different profiles for different Salesforce orgs

enableProfilesDescription.message: Create separate sets of tabs for different Salesforce orgs

autoSwitchProfilesDescription.message: Automatically switch to the appropriate profile based on the current Salesforce org's URL

keyboardShortcutsDescription.message: Set up keyboard shortcuts to quickly access your tabs

keyboardShortcutsHelp.message: Set keyboard shortcuts to quickly open tabs 1-10 by position

dangerZoneDescription.message: Irreversible actions that will affect your data

resetButtonDescription.message: This will remove all custom tabs and reset all settings to their default values. This action cannot be undone.

exportModalPrompt.message: Select what you want to export:

importModalPrompt.message: Where would you like to import this configuration?

resetModalPrompt.message: Are you sure you want to reset to default tabs and settings? This will:

enableSyncConfirmMessage.message:
Your tabs will be synced across all your computers using browser sync. This allows you to access your custom tabs on any device where you're signed in.

Note: Large configurations (>100KB) may not sync properly. Click OK to continue.

disableSyncConfirmMessage.message:
Your tabs will only be stored on this computer. They will not sync to other devices.

Click OK to continue.

disableProfilesConfirmMessage.message:
Disable profiles?

This will merge all tabs from all profiles into a single tab list. You can re-enable profiles later.

Click OK to continue.

settingsReset.message: All settings and tabs reset to defaults

tabsImportedToProfile.description: Tabs imported to profile status message

profileCreated.message: New profile created with imported tabs

syncEnabled.message: Sync enabled - tabs will now sync across devices

syncDisabled.message: Sync disabled - tabs stored locally only

errorInvalidConfig.message: Invalid configuration file - missing required fields

firstLaunchSetupDefaultTitle.description: Setup option title for starting with default tabs

firstLaunchSetupDefaultDescription.message: Start with the standard set of tabs
firstLaunchSetupDefaultDescription.description: Setup option description for starting with default tabs

firstLaunchSetupEmptyTitle.description: Setup option title for starting with an empty profile

firstLaunchSetupEmptyDescription.message: Begin with an empty profile and add tabs manually
firstLaunchSetupEmptyDescription.description: Setup option description for starting with an empty profile

firstLaunchSetupImportTitle.description: Setup option title for importing an existing configuration

firstLaunchSetupImportDescription.message: Import an SF Tabs configuration file
firstLaunchSetupImportDescription.description: Setup option description for importing an existing configuration

firstLaunchEnableProfilesDescription.message: Profiles let you manage different tab configurations

firstLaunchGuideButton.description: Button that opens the user guide

firstLaunchGetStartedButton.description: Primary button to complete first-launch setup

firstLaunchSyncFoundTitle.description: Heading shown when existing sync data is detected on a new device

firstLaunchSyncFoundMessage.message: We found existing SF Tabs data in your browser sync$PROFILES$.
firstLaunchSyncFoundMessage.description: Message shown when sync data is detected. $PROFILES$ is replaced with ' (X profiles with tabs)' when profiles exist, or omitted.

firstLaunchSyncFoundQuestion.message: Would you like to use it or start fresh?
firstLaunchSyncFoundQuestion.description: Question shown below the sync data detected message

firstLaunchUseSyncedButton.description: Button to use the existing synced configuration

firstLaunchStartFreshButton.description: Button to discard synced data and run the normal setup wizard

firstLaunchErrorLoadingSync.description: Error shown when loading synced configuration fails

firstLaunchErrorClearingSync.description: Error shown when clearing sync data before starting fresh fails

firstLaunchErrorSetup.description: Error shown when the Get Started initialization fails

closeButton.description: Close/dismiss button used in panels and modals

editButton.description: Edit action button label (short form used in lists)

learnMoreLink.description: Link text to open more information

sponsorLink.description: Link in settings sidebar footer to the GitHub sponsors page

buyMeCoffeeLink.description: Link in settings sidebar footer to the Buy Me a Coffee page

quickAddButtonTitle.description: Title attribute on the Quick Add button in the popup header

addNewTabButtonTitle.description: Title attribute on the Add New Tab button in the popup header

profilesButtonTitle.description: Title attribute on the Profiles button in the popup header

settingsButtonTitle.description: Title attribute on the Settings button in the popup header

emptyStateText.message: No custom tabs yet. Add your first tab below.
emptyStateText.description: Text shown in the popup when no tabs have been added yet

objectManagerDropdownLabel.description: Label for the Object Manager dropdown section in the tab form

setupAsObjectDropdownButton.description: Button to set up a tab as an Object Manager dropdown

setupAsObjectDropdownHelp.message: Create a dropdown menu with navigation items from the current Object Manager page
setupAsObjectDropdownHelp.description: Help text for the Setup as Object Dropdown button

refreshListButton.description: Button to refresh the dropdown items list in the tab form

createDropdownMenuLabel.description: Label for the manual dropdown creation section in the tab form

tabSettingsHeader.description: Header for the tab settings section in the action panel

tabNamePlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the tab name input

tabPathLabel.description: Label for the page URL input in the action panel

tabPathPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the tab path input

tabPathHelp.message: Just add the page name from the URL. Leave blank to create a folder-style tab that acts as a menu container.
tabPathHelp.description: Help text for the tab path input

tabIsObjectLabel.description: Label for the Object checkbox in the tab form

tabIsObjectHelp.message: Check this if the page is an object page instead of a setup page
tabIsObjectHelp.description: Help text for the Object checkbox

tabIsCustomUrlLabel.description: Label for the Custom URL checkbox in the tab form

tabIsCustomUrlHelp.message: Check this for special pages that don't follow setup or object patterns (e.g., Flow Trigger Explorer)
tabIsCustomUrlHelp.description: Help text for the Custom URL checkbox

confirmModalTitle.description: Title of the confirm reset modal dialog

confirmModalBody.message: Are you sure you want to reset to default tabs? This will remove any custom tabs you have added.
confirmModalBody.description: Body text of the confirm reset modal dialog

resetConfirmButton.description: Confirm button text in the reset to defaults modal

deleteModalTitle.description: Title of the delete tab confirmation modal dialog

deleteModalBody.message: Are you sure you want to remove this tab?
deleteModalBody.description: Body text of the delete tab confirmation modal dialog

notSalesforcePage.description: Status message shown when Quick Add is clicked on a non-Salesforce page

notSalesforceSetupPage.message: Not a recognized Salesforce setup or object page
notSalesforceSetupPage.description: Status message shown when Quick Add cannot identify the Salesforce page type

errorAccessingTab.description: Error shown when Quick Add fails to access the current tab; {$ERROR$}=error message

tabRemoved.description: Status message shown after deleting a tab

resetToDefaultTabsStatus.description: Status message shown after resetting tabs to defaults

tabNotFound.description: Error shown when a tab cannot be found by its ID

tabDuplicated.description: Status shown after duplicating a tab; {$NAME$}=tab label

noTabSelected.description: Error when the save action is triggered without a tab selected

tabNameRequired.description: Validation error shown when the tab name field is empty

tabCannotBeBoth.message: Tab cannot be both Object and Custom URL
tabCannotBeBoth.description: Validation error when both Object and Custom URL checkboxes are checked

parentTabNotFound.description: Error when the parent tab of a dropdown item cannot be found

dropdownItemNotFound.description: Error when a specific dropdown item cannot be found

dropdownItemUpdated.description: Status shown after successfully updating a dropdown item

tabCreated.description: Status shown after successfully creating a new tab

tabUpdated.description: Status shown after successfully updating an existing tab

errorInitializingPopup.description: Error shown if the popup fails to initialize; {$ERROR$}=error message

errorLoadingSettings.description: Error shown if settings fail to load; {$ERROR$}=error message

errorLoadingTabs.description: Error shown if tabs fail to load; {$ERROR$}=error message

errorCreatingTab.description: Error shown if tab creation fails; {$ERROR$}=error message

errorUpdatingTab.description: Error shown if tab update fails; {$ERROR$}=error message

errorUpdatingDropdownItem.description: Error shown if dropdown item update fails; {$ERROR$}=error message

errorCreateNotAvailable.description: Internal error shown if the tab create function is missing

errorUpdateNotAvailable.description: Internal error shown if the tab update function is missing

dragToReorderTitle.description: Title attribute on the drag handle element for reordering tabs

editTabButtonTitle.description: Title attribute on the edit/pencil icon button in the tab list

opensInNewTabTitle.message: Opens in new tab (click to change)
opensInNewTabTitle.description: Title on the new-tab toggle button when the tab opens in a new tab

opensInSameTabTitle.message: Opens in same tab (click to change)
opensInSameTabTitle.description: Title on the new-tab toggle button when the tab opens in the same tab

removeTabButtonTitle.description: Title attribute on the delete/trash icon button in the tab list

addNewTabFormTitle.description: Form title displayed when adding a new tab

editTabFormTitle.description: Form title displayed when editing an existing tab

noTabSelectedForEditing.description: Error when save is attempted in the dropdown form without a tab selected

errorSavingChanges.description: Error shown when saving drag-drop changes to dropdown items fails; {$ERROR$}=error message

errorTooManyDropdownLevels.description: Error when a drag-and-drop creates more than 3 nesting levels

dropdownItemCollapseTitle.description: Title on the collapse button for dropdown items that have children

dropdownItemExpandTitle.description: Title on the expand button for collapsed dropdown items with children

editDropdownItemTitle.description: Title on the Edit button for dropdown items in the manage dropdown panel

promoteToMainListTitle.description: Title on the Promote button for dropdown items

deleteDropdownItemTitle.description: Title on the Delete button for dropdown items

editDropdownItemPanelTitle.description: Title displayed in the action panel header when editing a dropdown item

newTabPanelTitle.description: Title displayed in the action panel header when adding a new tab

promotedWithNested.message: Promoted "$NAME$" with $COUNT$ nested items to main tab list
promotedWithNested.description: {$NAME$}=item label; {$COUNT$}=number of nested items promoted with it

errorPromotingItem.description: Error shown when promoting a dropdown item to the main list fails; {$ERROR$}=error message

deleteDropdownItemConfirm.description: Confirm dialog text when deleting a dropdown item; {$NAME$}=item label

itemWillBeDeleted.message: "$NAME$" will be deleted when you click Save
itemWillBeDeleted.description: Status shown when an item is staged for deletion; {$NAME$}=item label

itemWillBePromoted.message: "$NAME$" will be promoted when you click Save
itemWillBePromoted.description: Status shown when an item is staged for promotion; {$NAME$}=item label

itemWithNestedWillBePromoted.message: "$NAME$" with $COUNT$ nested items will be promoted when you click Save
